body: Closes #37 PR-2 of 2 (the retrieval-engine overhaul's second half). PR-1 (#42, merged) fixed the reranker never running + over-fetch + abstention + validate-build checksums + missing-model UX. This PR completes issue #37: chunking, keyword search, conversation context, budget coherence, embedder off-main-thread, air-gapped delivery hardening, storage hygiene, and the eval harness. ## Summary ### R4 ΓÇö keyword search correctness FlexSearch config changed `tokenize: 'full'` ΓåÆ `'forward'` (O(len) vs O(len┬▓); "rate" no longer matches "corporate"). Added an English stopword filter via `encoder: { filter: STOPWORDS }` (flexsearch 0.8.212 `EncoderOptions.filter: Set`). Search is now strict-first with `suggest: true` only as a second-chance fallback when strict returns 0 rows. Query preprocessing strips punctuation. ### R5 ΓÇö chunking (6 sub-fixes) - **Unbounded-chunk bug:** the long-sentence split now triggers whenever `sentenceUnitCount > chunkSize` (finalizing the in-flight chunk first), not only when the current chunk is empty ΓÇö fixes ~700-word chunks silently truncated at the embedder's 512-token cap. - **Overlap:** 100 ΓåÆ 32 (~12.5% of 256). - **Token-cap governor:** new `enforceTokenCap` post-pass splits any chunk whose word count exceeds the derived ceiling (~717 words Γëê 448 tokens). - **PDF:** structural reconstruction (hasEOL ΓåÆ `\n`, y-gap ΓåÆ `\n\n`, de-hyphenation of line-wrap breaks, running-header/footer stripping). - **XLSX:** header row re-emitted every 20 rows so chunks beyond the first carry column names. - **Empty-chunk guard:** zero-chunk extraction now sets `status: 'error'` (was `status: 'ready', chunkCount: 0`). - **Query-time dedup:** new `dedupAdjacentAndContained` drops adjacent same-doc chunks and ΓëÑ70%-contained candidates post-fusion. ### R6 ΓÇö conversation context (browser + server) The orchestrator accepts `history?: RAGHistoryTurn[]`, threads the last 4 turns into `buildMessages`, and contextualizes the retrieval query (prepends prior user turn when the question is short or pronoun-heavy). ChatPage builds the snapshot and passes it to both `orchestrator.query` (browser) and `startSSEStream` (server). `api_server.py` `QuestionRequest` gains `history`, threaded through `/ask` and `/ask/stream` to `engine.query(conversation_history=ΓÇª)`. ### R7 ΓÇö budget coherence `CHARS_PER_TOKEN` 4 ΓåÆ 3.7 (correctly documented as an upper bound on token count). Added `TEMPLATE_OVERHEAD_TOKENS=32` and per-image `IMAGE_TOKEN_ESTIMATE=512` (Gemma 4 E2B; conservative). History is charged to the token budget. `contextTrimmed` is now captured in `onDone` and rendered as a "Some sources didn't fit" notice in `ChatMessageBubble`. ### R8 ΓÇö embedder q8 + Web Worker - **q8 dtype:** embedder loads `dtype: 'q8'` (2.7ΓÇô3.4├ù faster, ~1ΓÇô2% retrieval-quality cost); manifest + prepare-models reference `model_quantized.onnx` (transformers.js q8 filename mapping). - **VECTOR_INDEX_VERSION 2 ΓåÆ 3:** single bump covering q8 + R5 chunking changes; re-index flag wired, P5 duplicate-guard bypass makes re-add painless. - **Web Worker:** new `embedding.worker.ts` owns the `feature-extraction` pipeline; `EmbeddingService` is a thin proxy (id-correlated postMessage, batch-progress forwarding, dispose-rejects-pending). Bulk ingestion no longer janks the UI. - **Thread cap:** 4 ΓåÆ 6 on ΓëÑ8-core machines (still 1 when not cross-origin-isolated). - **Dead-code deletion:** `selectModelTier`/`formatMemoryIndicator` (zero production consumers) + `lib/browser/browser-compat.ts` (zero consumers, external download URLs). ### P1 ΓÇö CI smoke New `scripts/smoke-coop-coep.mjs` serves dist/ with COOP/COEP and asserts the headers + a valid JS entry chunk. Wired into `web-ui.yml` after the validate-build step. (The full Playwright round-trip needs staged weights + a browser dep; documented as an operator check in PACKAGING.md.) ### P2 ΓÇö air-gap build flag `VITE_AIRGAP=1` (build-time literal) gates the `@mlc-ai/web-llm` dynamic import in `web-llm-service.ts._loadEngineFactory` so Rollup tree-shakes the heavy dep. `getLLMService` pins to wllama under airgap; `engine-capability` never recommends WebLLM; SettingsPage hides the WebLLM radio. New `build:airgap` script runs prepare-models + build + `validate-build --airgap` (the `--airgap` flag scans dist for `CreateMLCEngine`/`prebuiltMLCAppConfig` symbols + `web-llm` chunk names). ### P3 ΓÇö COOP/COEP chat-flow banner New `IsolationBanner` component (persistent, per-session dismissible) mounted in ChatPage. Surfaces the single-threaded-decode penalty in the chat flow when `!crossOriginIsolated`. ### P5 ΓÇö storage hygiene - `navigator.storage.persist()` at boot. - Clear Cache now deletes `docqa_conversations` + stale-profile edgevec blobs; copy updated. - Shared `duplicate-guard.ts` helper with re-index bypass (same-name+size doc with `chunkCount === 0` is NOT a duplicate ΓÇö unblocks re-add after a version bump). ### ┬º5 ΓÇö eval harness CI-runnable `eval-harness.test.ts` with an inlined labeled corpus: asserts in-corpus recall@k, out-of-corpus abstention, and the RRF k=60 invariant. Operator guidance script + README document the real-weight workflow. Gates future R9 model-swap decisions on numbers. ## Invariant audit (┬º3 do-not-break list ΓÇö all verified intact by the final critic) - BGE query prefix on queries only (`rag-orchestrator.ts`) ΓÇö preserved; retrieval-query contextualization prepends to the query side only. - L2-normalize + CLS pooling ΓÇö preserved (`embedding.worker.ts` applies `pooling: 'cls', normalize: true`). - RRF rank-only k=60 ΓÇö preserved (asserted by eval-harness acceptance #15). - Zero-chunk abstain path + image guard ΓÇö preserved; now reachable via R3 (PR-1). ## Test plan All run on `fix/web-ui-retrieval-engine-airgap-issue-37-pr2` after the final critic fixes. ``` $ npx tsc --noEmit # EXIT 0 $ npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.test.json # EXIT 0 $ npx vitest run Test Files 63 passed (63) Tests 1071 passed | 2 skipped (1073) [2 skips pre-existing] $ node --check scripts/build-airgap.mjs # EXIT 0 $ node --check scripts/smoke-coop-coep.mjs # EXIT 0 $ node --check scripts/validate-build.mjs # EXIT 0 $ node scripts/smoke-coop-coep.mjs # OK (served with COOP/COEP + valid JS chunk) ``` Test count is lower than PR-1's 1123 because dead-code tests for `browser-compat.ts` (~44 tests) + `selectModelTier`/`formatMemoryIndicator` were deleted with their sources; the net retrieval/worker/eval coverage increased. ## What this PR does NOT do - **R9 (model swaps): arctic-embed, ettin-reranker, edgevec 0.9 + FlatIndex** ΓÇö deferred per the issue's own OPTIONAL/gated-on-eval-harness labeling. The ┬º5 eval harness now lands as REQUIRED scope; R9 swaps can be evaluated with evidence in a follow-up PR. ## Review trail - Plan critic (GLM-5.2): NEEDS_REVISION ΓåÆ all addressed in the approved plan. - Implementation reviewer (Kimi K2.7): NEEDS_REVISION ΓåÆ fixed (JSONL malformed, run-eval README honesty, airgap validate-build symbol check, accurate airgap.ts comment; 1 false-positive: smoke IS wired to CI). - Final critic (GLM-5.2): NEEDS_REVISION ΓåÆ fixed (contextTrimmed onDone wire, IsolationBanner mount, R6 history client wiring for both browser+server, build:airgap invokes `validate-build --airgap`). 4 INFO items verified safe.
title: fix(web_ui): chunking, keyword, conversation, budget, embedder worker, air-gap hardening, eval harness (Issue #37 PR-2)
